app.name: cubic-dev-ai
app.description:
cubic helps teams like cal.com and n8n catch bugs before they go live, and merge PRs 28% faster.

- **Automated code reviews**: cubic's AI reviews your code on every PR. Catch bugs that human reviewers miss, in minutes.

- **Memory**: Tag @cubic-dev-ai with feedback to teach it about your codebase

- **Pull Request Description**: The pull request diff is clearly summarised, so you can quickly see the intent of the changes.
